metadata.name: Docker Volume Backup
metadata.description: Backs up data from a Docker container path by auto-attaching all container volumes into a temporary backup container. Creates timestamped tar.gz archives with configurable retention.

items.name: container_name
items.title: Container Name
items.description: Name of the Docker container to back up

items.name: backup_retention_days
items.title: Retention Days
items.description: Delete backup archives older than this many days

items.name: backup_container_path
items.title: Backup Path
items.description: Path inside the container that should be archived

items.name: stop_containers_during_backup
items.title: Stop Backup
items.description: If enabled, stop the container before backup and start it again afterwards if it was running

items.name: backup_timestamp
items.title: Backup Timestamp
items.description: Value used for the internal settings.

items.name: backup_root
items.title: Backup Root
items.description: Value used for the internal settings.

items.name: backup_archive_name
items.title: Backup Archive Name
items.description: Name to use for the backup archive.

items.name: item
items.title: Loop Item
items.description: Value used for the internal settings.

items.name: old_backups
items.title: Old Backups
items.description: Value used for the internal settings.
